CustomField.description: If the Name on this record is not how the company is registered on LinkedIn, the automated formula from any Contact to their LinkedIn profile won't work. In those cases, enter in this field the registered LinkedIn name for this company.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If the Name on this record is not how the company is registered on LinkedIn, the automated formula from any Contact to their LinkedIn profile won't work. In those cases, enter in this field the registered LinkedIn name for this company.
CustomField.label: LinkedIn Name
